_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: there were no significant statistical differences in the weight of non-tumour bearing mice between the MG-132 group (5–10 mg/kg), Nutlin-3 group (40 mg/kg), vehicle group and Nutlin-3 &MG-132 group
details: No significant weight differences between MG-132 (5-10 mg/kg), Nutlin-3 (40 mg/kg), vehicle, and combination groups; no deaths or obvious behavioral differences observed
